vanilla-chocolate-pizzelles.name: Vanilla & Chocolate Pizzelles
instructions: Get two large bowls for the two different flavors.
In one bowl, mix together the ingredients of the vanilla pizzelles. In another, mix together the chocolate pizzelle ingredients.
Cook each pizzelle in a pizzelle maker for 20 seconds, then place on a wire rack to cool.
Serve.
Enjoy!

vegan-black-bean-and-sweet-potato-salad.name: Vegan Black Bean And Sweet Potato Salad

ingredients.item: Coarse salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Drizzle sweet potatoes with 1 tablespoon olive oil on a rimmed baking sheet; season with cumin, pepper flakes, salt, and black pepper. Toss until evenly coated.
Roast in the preheated oven on the lower rack, stirring halfway through, until sweet potatoes tender, 25 to 35 minutes.
Whisk remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil and lime juice together in a large bowl; season with salt and black pepper. Add sweet potatoes, black beans, onion, and cilantro; gently toss to coat.

vegan-chocolate-cake.name: Vegan Chocolate Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease one 9x5-inch loaf pan.

Sift together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. Mix in water, grapeseed oil, vanilla extract, and apple cider vinegar. Mix together until smooth. Pour batter into the prepared loaf pan.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, about 45 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen. Invert carefully onto a serving plate or cooling rack. Let cool completely.

vegan-quinoa-pilaf-with-vegetables-argir.name: Vegan Quinoa Pilaf With Vegetables

ingredients.item: A few drops of lemon juice
A few drops of lemon juice

instructions: We'll use grilled or boiled beets and pumpkins.
Rinse the quinoa in a colander under running water.
Boil the quinoa in salted water until it opens for a few minutes and drain into a colander.
Cut the onion into thin slices and the vegetables into frame.
Heat the olive oil and sauté for 1 minute the brown garlic clove. We're removing it.
Sauté the opinions in the olive oil for 3 minutes.
Add the vegetarians, sauté for 3 minutes and add the quinoa.
Salt and pepper, mix and withdraw from the fire.
Strain the orange and lemon.
Sprinkle with herbs and almonds.
Serve the pilafi with quinoa hot as vegan meal or cold as salad or accompaniment.
For vegetables
Wash the beets (medium beets) and put them on foil. Add some olive oil, some balsamic vinegar, add a clove of garlic with the peel and a twig of thyme. Salt and pepper.
Seal the fol and bake for 40 minutes at 200 °C in the air (preheated oven).
Then peel them and use them in salads etc.
For the pumpkin
Clean the pumpkin, cut into slices and put it in a baking pan.
Salt and sprinkle with some olive oil.
Sprinkle with some thyme and baking for 25 minutes to 200
See here more delicious vegan recipes for food and sweets.

vegan-rhubarb-cinnamon-streusel-muffins.name: Vegan Rhubarb Cinnamon Streusel Muffins
instructions: Bring water and flax seeds to a boil in a medium saucepan; reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes. Strain mixture; discard seeds. Cool flax egg mixture until lukewarm.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Line 18 muffin cups with paper liners.
Combine soy milk and lemon juice in a small bowl; set aside until curdled, about 5 minutes.
Combine flour, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl; set aside.

Combine 1 ¼ cups brown sugar and oil in a separate bowl. Whisk in ½ cup flax egg mixture, curdled soy milk, and vanilla extract until well combined; stir into flour mixture along with rhubarb until just incorporated. Spoon batter into the prepared muffin cups, filling each ¾ full.
Combine ½ cup brown sugar, vegan margarine, and cinnamon in a small bowl until crumbly. Spoon evenly over each muffin.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into centers comes out clean, 20 to 25 minutes. Cool in the tins for 10 minutes before transferring muffins to a wire rack to cool completely.

vegan-shepherds-pie.name: Vegan Shepherd’s Pie
instructions: Preheat oven to 220ºC (425ºF).
In a medium-large pot, over medium heat, combine oil, garlic, and onions. Cook for one minute, until onions start to soften.
Add celery and carrots, stir until onions are translucent.
Add mushrooms, corn, parsley, tomato paste, thyme, sage, salt, and pepper until well mixed.
Add veggie stock in half-cup (120 ml) increments, allowing it to come to a simmer before adding more.
Add flour, then mix. Continue mixing until the mixture thickens.
Once thick, remove from heat and pour into a pie dish.
Add potatoes to a large pot and cover with lightly salted water. Set over medium-high heat and bring to a boil. Cook until potatoes have softened and are fork-tender.
Remove from heat and drain.
Mash potatoes then add butter, milk, salt, and pepper.
Spoon potato mixture over the top of the veggies in the pie dish, and smooth so that it is evenly spread.
Optional: Using a butter knife or a long, thin spatula. press into potato surface every inch (2 ½cm) to create a beautiful, undulating presentation.
Bake pie for 20-25 minutes.
Allow to cool for five minutes then serve.
Enjoy!

vegan-twice-baked-sweet-potatoes.name: Vegan Twice-baked Sweet Potatoes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Pierce sweet potatoes all over with a fork. Rub 1 tablespoon sea salt into potato skins. Place on a parchment-lined baking sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven until a sharp knife easily cuts into potatoes, 50 to 60 minutes. Remove from oven and allow to cool enough to handle, about 10 minutes. Leave the oven on; cut potatoes in half lengthwise.

Scoop out each potato half into a large bowl, making sure to keep the outer peel/shell intact. Mash the cooked sweet potato flesh thoroughly, until smooth, then add cream cheese, butter, brown sugar, 1 teaspoon salt, pepper, cinnamon, 1/8 teaspoon nutmeg, and ginger. Mix completely. Spoon filling into each potato skin. Place filled skins back onto the parchment-lined pan. Sprinkle with panko bread crumbs. Cut vegan Cheddar into strips and layer onto potatoes like lattice.

Bake in the preheated oven until potatoes are just beginning to brown, 10 to 12 minutes. Remove from oven; sprinkle with parsley and green onions. Bake for an additional 3 to 5 minutes. Sprinkle with remaining nutmeg prior to serving.

vegan-zucchini-brownies.name: Vegan Zucchini Brownies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray.

Combine sugar, brown sugar, and olive oil in a large bowl; beat with an electric mixer until well combined. Mix in vanilla extract. Add flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt and mix until combined. (Mixture will be dry).
Add zucchini and mix with a spoon until incorporated. Allow to sit for 5 minutes until mixture becomes more wet. Stir in vegan chocolate chips. Transfer batter to the prepared pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until top is dry and edges have started to pull away from the sides of the pan, 25 to 30 minutes. Let cool completely before slicing.

vegetable-pie-with-feta-cheese-and-aroma.name: Vegetable Pie With Feta Cheese And Aromatic Herbs
vegetable-pie-with-feta-cheese-and-aroma.original_name: Χορτόπιτα με φέτα και αρωματικά χόρτα

ingredients.item: 1 kg of spinach washed and drained
2 greens large (the tender part only keep it for broth)
1 mash fresh onions with their leaves
1 kg of spinach washed and drained
2 greens large (the tender part only keep it for broth)
1 mash fresh onions with their leaves

instructions: Wash and drain first all the herbs and herbs in a colander.
Finely chop them in a bowl and sprinkle them with salt.
Mix them and let them stand for 15'-20', remove their liquids.
Then tighten them in our palms, wither and remove as many fluids as possible.
It will reduce the filling to half its volume.
Add the feta cheese and grated pepper.
Add a shallow baking pan of 36 cm, make a curate leaf and pour with some olive oil each.
Down we put six cards.
Empty the filling and pour with the olive oil.
Cover with the remaining leaves, curate, sprinkle one with olive oil.
Turn the edges of the leaves.
Place the pie in pieces, sprinkle with some water and some oil.
Bake in resistors on the last grill, at 180

veggie-italian-hoagies.name: Veggie Italian Hoagies
instructions: Mix giardiniera into mayonnaise in a small bowl. Thickly spread some giardiniera mixture over the bottom half of each roll. Top each with tomato slices; season with salt. Layer on a thick tuft of shredded lettuce; season lettuce with salt, pepper, and a splash of reserved giardiniera brine (about 1 Tbsp. per sandwich). Drizzle with oil.

velvet-smoked-salmon-mousse-argiro.name: Velvet Smoked Salmon Mousse

ingredients.item: Frozen whole milling or rye buns
Frozen whole milling or rye buns

instructions: We start the salmon mousse, putting gelatin in a bowl with cold water to soak.
Cut the salmon to pieces.
Beat the blender with salmon, yogurt, mayonnaise.
Add dill, zest, lemon and salt (with caution salt, because salmon is salty).
After fluffying and seasoning the mixture, transfer to a bowl.
Shake the inflated gelatin with your hands and dissolve in 3 tablespoons of boiling water.
Mix very well until it dissolves.
Add the melted gelatin to the salmon mousse and mix very well with a spoon and quick moves.
In long or round cake pan, we make a membrane, cover the walls.
Empty the salmon mousse and freeze for at least 5 hours.
When we are about to serve, we disfigure the mousse by turning the form over to a platter and remove the membrane.
Decorate the surface with grooves, stripes vertical or diagonal, caviar alternately with brik.
Serve with toasted whole grain buns.

very-pipirrana-recipe-comedera.name: Very Pipirrana Recipe

ingredients.item: 120 ml de aceite de oliva extra virgen

instructions: Lleva una olla con agua al fuego y cuando hierva incorpora los tomates.
Cook tomatoes for two minutes, remove from fire and pass to a bowl with cold water to cut the cooking.
Once the tomatoes have been escalated, they will be pitted and cut finely.
He's been hurting his eggs for 10 minutes. After that time, remove them from the pot and place them in a bowl with cold water.
Peel the eggs and cut them into notebooks. Reserve.
Clean the green pepper, remove the seed and stem. Cut into small notebooks. Do the same with onion.
Maja el diente de ajo en un mortero con un poco de sal hasta formar una pasta.
Vierte el aceite de oliva progresivamente mientras majas hasta que tengas una pasta emulsionada. Reserva.
Incorpora en un bol los tomates, el pimiento y la cebolla.
Agrega la pasta de ajo y aceite de oliva, pimienta al gusto y la cantidad de vinagre de vino de tu preferencia. Mezcla muy bien hasta que todo se integre.
Add the eggs and mix slightly to integrate.
Ajusta de sal y deja reposar la ensalada en la nevera durante 20 minutos para asentar los sabores.
After that time, you'll be ready to enjoy as you wish.
